tool_args.label: B46 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: B46 Select Bus Service - proposed SBS service on Utica Avenue corridor presented to Community Board 9

payload.description: Proposed B46 Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue corridor. Northern terminal at DeKalb Avenue. B46 SBS will make limited stops south of Avenue H. B46 Local extended to Williamsburg Bridge Plaza 24 hours a day. Standard (non-articulated) buses. Launch planned for September 2015.

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue B46 corridor
tool_args.raw_text: The Utica Avenue B46 corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study.

payload.description: The Utica Avenue B46 corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study. Street design implemented from St. Johns Place to Church Avenue (Summer 2014). Proposed bus lane extension from Church Avenue to Fillmore Avenue (Summer 2015).

tool_args.label: B46 SBS (proposed)
tool_args.raw_text: Proposed B46 SBS Stations

payload.description: Proposed B46 SBS with northern terminal at DeKalb Avenue, limited stops south of Avenue H. Standard (non-articulated) buses.

tool_args.label: B46 Local
tool_args.raw_text: B46 Local generally travels between Kings Plaza and DeKalb Ave

payload.description: B46 Local generally travels between Kings Plaza and DeKalb Ave. Under proposed SBS plan, B46 Local will be extended to Williamsburg Bridge Plaza 24 hours a day.

tool_args.label: B46 LTD
tool_args.raw_text: B46 LTD generally travels between Kings Plaza and Williamsburg Bridge Plaza

payload.description: B46 LTD generally travels between Kings Plaza and Williamsburg Bridge Plaza. Makes all local stops north of DeKalb Ave and south of Ave H.

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue long-term improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Long-Term (2016-2017) • Implement transit signal priority • Construct bus bulbs at SBS stations south of Eastern Parkway • Add real-time passenger information, new shelters, plantings, and benches • Add curb extensions, pedestrian islands, and high-visibility crosswalks • Resurface Utica Avenue

payload.description: Implement transit signal priority, construct bus bulbs at SBS stations south of Eastern Parkway, add real-time passenger information, new shelters, plantings, benches, curb extensions, pedestrian islands, high-visibility crosswalks, and resurface Utica Avenue

tool_args.label: B46 corridor characteristics
tool_args.raw_text: Ranked by community as one of two corridors most in need of improvements • Characterized by slow and crowded trips • Crucial connection to 3 4 A C trains and 30 bus routes • Vision Zero Priority Corridor

payload.claim_text: The Utica Avenue B46 corridor was characterized by slow and crowded trips, ranked by community as one of two corridors most in need of improvements. Crucial connection to 3 4 A C trains and 30 bus routes. Vision Zero Priority Corridor.

tool_args.label: No stop changes in CB9
tool_args.raw_text: No stop changes proposed in CB9

payload.claim_text: No stop changes proposed in CB9
payload.description: Under the proposed B46 SBS and Local service plan, no stop changes are proposed in Community Board 9's area.

tool_args.label: SBS definition
tool_args.raw_text: Select Bus Service (SBS) is New York City's brand name for Bus Rapid Transit: an improved bus service that offers fast, frequent, and reliable service on high-ridership bus routes.

payload.claim_text: Select Bus Service (SBS) is New York City's brand name for Bus Rapid Transit: an improved bus service that offers fast, frequent, and reliable service on high-ridership bus routes.

tool_args.label: SBS results
tool_args.raw_text: • 15-23% faster bus speeds • About 10% increase in ridership • More reliable service • Customer satisfaction of 95% • Safer streets / reduction in crashes

payload.claim_text: SBS has brought: 15-23% faster bus speeds, about 10% increase in ridership, more reliable service, customer satisfaction of 95%, safer streets / reduction in crashes.
